response.justification: Maria Rodriguez is a technically capable individual contributor with a broad multi-language background and recent exposure to agentic AI tooling, but she is fundamentally mismatched for an executive CTO role. Her entire career is at the Senior/Staff Developer level with no evidence of people management, team scaling, org-building, or engineering leadership of any kind. The role demands 5+ years of senior technical leadership, a track record of growing teams from 10 to 30+ engineers, board-level communication, and production multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments — none of which appear anywhere in this resume.
strengths: Recent hands-on contribution to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP framework tooling at re:cinq, showing genuine early engagement with the agentic paradigm
Demonstrated experience building high-throughput distributed microservices systems at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with real-time constraints
Fintech-adjacent exposure through RIDE Capital (investment platform) and Optilyz (pricing optimization), indicating some domain familiarity
concerns: Zero engineering leadership experience — no people management, hiring, team scaling, architectural ownership, or org-building appears anywhere in a 17-year career
Title ceiling is Staff/Senior Developer; the role requires an executive who has held VP, Director, or CTO-equivalent positions with documented accountability for organizational outcomes

No evidence of production multi-agent AI systems at meaningful scale, LLM evaluation methodology, credit/payment infrastructure depth, or regulatory compliance work — the core hard requirements are unmet
